name: empty-state
title: BTEmptyState
description: Empty/error state organism with 7 variants. Error variants (400/401/404/500/under-maintenance) show a large illustration, title, subtext, error message, and an optional action button. Simple variants (no-data/no-result) show a small illustration and a single label line.

files.content:
export { BTEmptyState } from './BTEmptyState';
export type { BTEmptyStateProps, BTEmptyStateVariant } from './BTEmptyState.types';
